LanguageData.ClashOfRim_TraitTrainer.label: trait trainer
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_TraitTrainer.description: A neurotrainer which induces a selected trait in the user's mind.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_RandomTraitTrainer.label: trait trainer (random)
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_RandomTraitTrainer.descriptio: A neurotrainer which induces a random trait in the user's mind.
